chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Revision Appln. No.S-39 of 2018. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.03.2022 Mr. Safdar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Naimtullah Bhurgri, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- The applicant by way of instant criminal revision application has impugned order dated 08.05.2018, whereby learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana, has amended the charge. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the learned trial Court has amended the charge without providing chance of hearing to the applicant; therefore, the impugned order being illegal is liable to be set aside, which is not opposed by learned Addl.P.G for the State and learned counsel for private respondent. Heard arguments and perused the record. There is nothing in impugned order, which may suggest that it has been passed by learned trial Court after providing chance of hearing to the applicant, which is contrary to the mandate contained by Article 10-A of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, which prescribes the right of fair trial to everyone. Consequently, the impugned order is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to pass the same afresh after providing chance of hearing to all the concerned. The instant Crl. Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
